audit_events.event: Escalation workflow initiated: 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline. Recovery teams have been engaged.

customer_messages.body: We are reaching out proactively regarding your account. Our team has identified several areas that require immediate attention, including regulatory hold, overdue invoice, delayed shipment, escalated support, usage decline. Dedicated recovery owners across the relevant teams have been assigned and will be in contact shortly to discuss next steps and work with you toward resolution. We appreciate your continued partnership and are committed to resolving these matters as quickly as possible.
